## Checklist

- [ ] FMI-LS-DAE version updated in schema, XML examples, and header files
- [ ] CI passes on the release tag
- [ ] `fmi-ls-dae.zip` artifact downloaded from [GitHub Actions](https://github.com/modelica/fmi-ls-dae/actions) and checked for completeness
- [ ] Artifact uploaded as `fmi-ls-dae-<version>.zip` (e.g. `fmi-ls-dae-1.0-rc.1.zip`)
- [ ] `This is a pre-release` checked if this is not the final release
